title: Detecting protein and DNA/RNA structures in cryo-EM maps of intermediate resolution using deep learning
author: Wang, Xiao
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Here all the pre-trained models are included in two zipped files. 
 All simulated and experimental map based-models for contour provided cases are saved in best_model.tar.gz. 
 For unknown contour condition, the pretrained model is saved in nocontour_best_model.tar.gz
steps_raw:
Here all the pre-trained models are included in two zipped files. 
 All simulated and experimental map based-models for contour provided cases are saved in best_model.tar.gz. 
 For unknown contour condition, the pretrained model is saved in nocontour_best_model.tar.gz
